templates.name: character_walk_cycle
templates.description: 4-directional walk cycle for player characters (front, back, left, right).

prompt.base: {faction_style} character, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k, noise, grain, watermark
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: left foot forward, right foot back, neutral stance
Frame 2: feet passing, mid-step, slight forward lean
Frame 3: right foot forward, left foot back, full stride
Frame 4: right foot planted, left foot lifting, transition to next step

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat, neon visor, glowing green accents
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, sleek helmet, corporate insignia
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark green/black cloak, glowing eyes, stealthy posture
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, neutral colors, no faction insignia

effects.electric: electric aura, glowing visor, energy particles
effects.fire: flame trails, smoke particles, glowing red accents
effects.stealth: smoke particles, flickering transparency, dark aura

output.layout: 4x4 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 128x128 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Transparent backgrounds may cause artifacts. Test with solid color first.
Frame consistency may vary. Use frameDescriptions for guidance.
Faction styles may require manual tweaking for pixel art clarity.

templates.name: character_run_cycle
templates.description: 4-directional run cycle for player characters (faster than walk).

prompt.base: {faction_style} character running, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, dynamic pose
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: left foot forward, right foot back, full stride, arms pumping
Frame 2: feet off ground, mid-air, forward lean, arms extended
Frame 3: right foot forward, left foot back, landing, arms swinging
Frame 4: right foot planted, left foot lifting, transition to next stride

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat flowing, neon visor, glowing green accents
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, helmet visor down, corporate insignia
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark cloak billowing, glowing eyes, stealthy posture
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, neutral colors, no faction insignia

effects.electric: electric aura, glowing visor, energy particles, motion blur
effects.fire: flame trails, smoke particles, glowing red accents, heat distortion
effects.stealth: smoke particles, flickering transparency, dark aura, motion blur

output.layout: 2x4 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 128x64 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Run cycles may appear too slow. Adjust frame count or speed in-game.
Motion blur effects may not render clearly in pixel art. Use particles instead.

templates.name: character_idle
templates.description: 4-directional idle animation for player characters (breathing, subtle movements).

prompt.base: {faction_style} character idle, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, subtle breathing animation
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: neutral stance, arms relaxed, slight breath in
Frame 2: peak of breath, chest slightly expanded, arms at sides
Frame 3: returning to neutral, breath out, subtle shoulder movement
Frame 4: neutral stance, arms relaxed, ready for action

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat, neon visor dimly lit, glowing green accents
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, helmet visor up, corporate insignia
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark cloak, glowing eyes dim, stealthy posture
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, neutral colors, no faction insignia

effects.electric: flickering electric aura, glowing visor, energy particles
effects.fire: flickering flame aura, smoke particles, glowing red accents
effects.stealth: flickering transparency, dark aura, smoke particles

output.layout: 1x4 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 128x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Idle animations may appear static. Use subtle movements (e.g., breathing, eye flickers).
Faction-specific details may be lost at 32x32 resolution. Test with higher resolutions if needed.

templates.name: character_attack
templates.description: 4-directional attack animation for player characters (melee or ranged).

prompt.base: {faction_style} character attacking, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, dynamic pose, weapon visible
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: wind-up, weapon pulled back, character leaning back
Frame 2: strike initiation, weapon moving forward, character leaning forward
Frame 3: impact frame, weapon fully extended, character at peak forward lean
Frame 4: recovery, weapon retracting, character returning to neutral
Frame 5: follow-through, weapon fully retracted, character leaning back slightly
Frame 6: return to idle, character neutral, ready for next action

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat, neon visor, glowing green energy sword
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, energy rifle, corporate insignia
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark cloak, dagger, glowing eyes, stealthy posture
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, sword, neutral colors, no faction insignia

effects.electric: electric aura, weapon glow, energy particles, impact flash
effects.fire: flame trails, weapon glow, smoke particles, impact explosion
effects.stealth: smoke particles, weapon glow, dark aura, impact distortion

output.layout: 1x6 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 192x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Attack animations may appear too slow. Adjust frame timing in-game.
Weapon visibility may be lost at 32x32 resolution. Use high-contrast colors.

templates.name: character_cast_spell

prompt.base: {faction_style} character casting a spell, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, dynamic pose, spell effect visible
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: wind-up, hands raised, spell energy gathering
Frame 2: energy buildup, hands glowing, spell particles forming
Frame 3: peak buildup, hands fully charged, spell ready to release
Frame 4: release initiation, hands moving forward, spell energy flowing
Frame 5: spell impact, hands fully extended, energy burst
Frame 6: follow-through, hands returning, residual energy
Frame 7: recovery, hands at sides, spell effect dissipating
Frame 8: return to idle, character neutral, ready for next action

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat, neon visor, glowing green spell energy
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, energy rifle charging, corporate insignia
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark cloak, glowing eyes, dark spell energy
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, neutral spell energy, no faction insignia

effects.electric: electric aura, spell glow, energy particles, impact flash
effects.fire: flame trails, spell glow, smoke particles, impact explosion
effects.stealth: smoke particles, spell glow, dark aura, impact distortion

output.layout: 1x8 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 256x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Spell effects may be hard to distinguish at 32x32 resolution. Use high-contrast colors.
Energy buildup frames may appear static. Use particle effects for dynamism.

templates.name: character_die
templates.description: One-shot death animation for player characters (no directional variants).

prompt.base: {faction_style} character dying, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, dramatic pose, collapse animation
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: hit reaction, character recoiling, weapon dropping
Frame 2: collapse initiation, character falling to knees, arms outstretched
Frame 3: mid-fall, character leaning forward, hair/cloak flowing
Frame 4: impact, character hitting the ground, dust particles
Frame 5: death throes, character twitching, eyes fading
Frame 6: final pose, character motionless, eyes closed

factionStyles.syndicate: cyberpunk hacker, trench coat, neon visor flickering out, glowing green accents fading
factionStyles.corporate: futuristic security guard, blue/white armor, helmet visor cracking, corporate insignia fading
factionStyles.rogue: hooded thief, dark cloak, glowing eyes dimming, stealthy posture collapsing
factionStyles.neutral: generic adventurer, brown leather armor, neutral colors, no faction insignia

effects.electric: electric aura fading, energy particles dissipating, impact flash
effects.fire: flame trails extinguishing, smoke particles, impact explosion
effects.stealth: smoke particles dissipating, dark aura fading, impact distortion

output.layout: 1x6 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 192x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Death animations may appear too slow. Adjust frame timing for urgency.
Transparent backgrounds may cause artifacts. Use solid color for testing.

templates.name: spell_impact
templates.description: One-shot spell impact animation (e.g., fireball explosion, electric shock).

prompt.base: {effect_style} spell impact, pixel art style, 64x64 pixels per frame, transparent background, dramatic explosion, particle effects
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k, character, background
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: impact initiation, small explosion, particles forming
Frame 2: explosion growth, particles expanding, shockwave visible
Frame 3: peak explosion, maximum brightness, particles at full spread
Frame 4: explosion dissipation, particles fading, smoke forming
Frame 5: smoke formation, particles turning to smoke, brightness fading
Frame 6: smoke dissipation, particles thinning, residual glow
Frame 7: residual smoke, particles almost gone, faint glow
Frame 8: cleanup, particles fully dissipated, transparent background

effectStyles.electric: electric shock, blue/white energy, lightning bolts, impact flash
effectStyles.fire: fireball explosion, red/orange flames, smoke particles, impact explosion
effectStyles.ice: ice shatter, blue/white crystals, frost particles, impact freeze
effectStyles.poison: toxic cloud, green/purple gas, poison particles, impact splash

effects.electric: electric aura, energy particles, impact flash
effects.fire: flame trails, smoke particles, impact explosion
effects.ice: frost particles, ice shards, impact freeze
effects.poison: toxic gas, poison particles, impact splash

output.layout: 1x8 grid, 64x64 pixels per frame, 512x64 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Spell impacts may appear too small at 64x64. Test with higher resolutions if needed.
Particle effects may be hard to distinguish. Use high-contrast colors.

templates.name: weapon_trail
templates.description: One-shot weapon trail animation (e.g., sword slash, laser beam).

prompt.base: {effect_style} weapon trail, pixel art style, 64x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, dynamic motion blur, glowing effect
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k, character, background
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: trail initiation, small glow, particles forming
Frame 2: trail growth, glow expanding, particles spreading
Frame 3: peak trail, maximum brightness, particles at full spread
Frame 4: trail dissipation, glow fading, particles thinning
Frame 5: residual trail, faint glow, particles almost gone
Frame 6: cleanup, trail fully dissipated, transparent background

effectStyles.electric: electric sword slash, blue/white energy, lightning bolts, motion blur
effectStyles.fire: flaming sword slash, red/orange flames, smoke particles, motion blur
effectStyles.ice: frost sword slash, blue/white crystals, frost particles, motion blur
effectStyles.poison: toxic dagger slash, green/purple gas, poison particles, motion blur

effects.electric: electric aura, energy particles, motion blur
effects.fire: flame trails, smoke particles, motion blur
effects.ice: frost particles, ice shards, motion blur
effects.poison: toxic gas, poison particles, motion blur

output.layout: 1x6 grid, 64x32 pixels per frame, 384x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Weapon trails may appear too short. Adjust frame count or trail length.
Motion blur may not render clearly in pixel art. Use particles instead.

templates.name: state_poisoned
templates.description: Looping poisoned state animation for player characters (overlay effect).

prompt.base: poisoned state overlay, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, green/purple toxic gas, pulsing effect
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k, character, background
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: gas initiation, small cloud forming, low opacity
Frame 2: gas growth, cloud expanding, medium opacity
Frame 3: peak gas, cloud at full size, high opacity
Frame 4: gas dissipation, cloud thinning, low opacity

effects.poison: toxic gas, green/purple particles, pulsing effect

output.layout: 1x4 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 128x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Overlay effects may obscure character details. Use low opacity.
Pulsing effects may appear too fast. Adjust frame timing.

templates.name: state_buffed
templates.description: Looping buffed state animation for player characters (e.g., strength, speed).

prompt.base: buffed state overlay, pixel art style, 32x32 pixels per frame, transparent background, electric aura, pulsing effect
prompt.negative: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, photograph, gradient, anti-aliased, modern, hd, 4k, character, background
frameDescriptions: Frame 1: aura initiation, small glow forming, low opacity
Frame 2: aura growth, glow expanding, medium opacity
Frame 3: peak aura, glow at full size, high opacity
Frame 4: aura dissipation, glow thinning, low opacity

effects.electric: electric aura, blue/white energy, pulsing effect
effects.fire: flame aura, red/orange glow, pulsing effect
effects.ice: frost aura, blue/white glow, pulsing effect

output.layout: 1x4 grid, 32x32 pixels per frame, 128x32 total spritesheet size

edgeCases: Overlay effects may obscure character details. Use low opacity.
Pulsing effects may appear too fast. Adjust frame timing.
